pytorch_test_cases.test:
import torch
Q = torch.tensor(0.0)
k = 1
R = torch.tensor(5.0)
print(round(incremental_mean(Q, k, R).item(), 4))

import torch
Q = torch.tensor(5.0)
k = 2
R = torch.tensor(7.0)
print(round(incremental_mean(Q, k, R).item(), 4))

import torch
Q = torch.tensor(6.0)
k = 3
R = torch.tensor(4.0)
print(round(incremental_mean(Q, k, R).item(), 4))

tinygrad_test_cases.test:
from tinygrad.tensor import Tensor
Q = Tensor([0.0])
k = Tensor([1.0])
R = Tensor([5.0])
result = incremental_mean(Q, k, R)
print(round(result.item(), 4))

from tinygrad.tensor import Tensor
Q = Tensor([5.0])
k = Tensor([2.0])
R = Tensor([7.0])
result = incremental_mean(Q, k, R)
print(round(result.item(), 4))

from tinygrad.tensor import Tensor
Q = Tensor([6.0])
k = Tensor([3.0])
R = Tensor([4.0])

print(round(result.item(), 4))
